1838430.name: Creatures Docking Station - Science Kit
1838430.description:
Unleash your inner scientist!

This Science Kit compiles three tools, enabling players to view and tinker directly with deeper systems contained within Creatures Docking Station and Creatures 3.

  • Biochemistry Set
    This advanced tool allows you to get more control and feedback on the state of any creature's biochemistry. It provides graphing and injection tools to allow full manipulation and diagnosis of the state of any chemical in the game.
  • Genetics Kit
    Now you can create new life with the Creatures 3 Genetics Kit! With the Genetics Kit, you have complete control over each and every gene in your Creatures' genomes. You can easily create genetic hybrids between Norns, Grendels and Ettins, or even build your own life-form from scratch!
  • Brain in a Vat Tool
    This advanced tool is for those of you who enjoy watching the brain in action. With this tool you can watch the brain of any creature in-game, from neurons firing to dendrites strengthening. Alternatively you can load up any Creatures 3 genome and watch how the brain reacts to situations you set up within the tool ... Brain-in-a-VAT style.
